_comment: Single source of truth for error codes. Append entries (never reorder/delete a shipped one). `Hx.Runner.Cli errorcodes render` assigns the per-category number, composes the code <PREFIX><NNNN>, and regenerates tools/Hx.Cli.Kernel/ErrorCodes.g.cs; `errorcodes check` freezes the shipped set (errorcodes/shipped.json).

codes.message: An unhandled internal error occurred.
codes.remediation: This is a bug — report it with the command and inputs.

codes.message: Invalid command arguments.
codes.remediation: Run the command with --help to see valid usage.

codes.message: Validation failed.
codes.remediation: Fix the reported issues and re-run.

codes.message: An integrity verification failed.
codes.remediation: Re-vendor or re-verify the tool/proof; do not bypass the gate.

codes.message: No vendored-tool asset is mapped for the host RID.
codes.remediation: This RID has no pinned asset yet; vendor one, or run on a supported RID (win-x64).

codes.message: A downloaded tool archive's SHA-256 does not match the manifest.
codes.remediation: Do not install the binary; re-check the pinned downloadUrl/archiveSha256 in the tool manifest.

codes.message: A fetched tool executable's SHA-256 does not match the manifest.
codes.remediation: Do not install the binary; re-check the pinned executableSha256 in the tool manifest.

codes.message: A vendored-tool download or extraction failed.
codes.remediation: Check network connectivity and the pinned downloadUrl, then re-run the fetch.

codes.message: The pinned tool version is not present in the shared tool store.
codes.remediation: Run `tools fetch` to populate the store, or reinstall `hx` via its channel (`dotnet tool update -g Heurex.SpeckitDoti`, or the Microsoft Store); the solution pins a version the store lacks.

codes.message: The solution was generated by a newer toolkit than is installed.
codes.remediation: Upgrade the installed toolkit/installer to match the solution's pinned versions; the tool refuses to downgrade.

codes.message: A shared-store tool binary's SHA-256 does not match the manifest.
codes.remediation: Do not use the binary; run `tools fetch` to re-populate the store from a verified source, or reinstall `hx` via its channel (`dotnet tool update -g Heurex.SpeckitDoti`, or the Microsoft Store).

codes.message: Populating the shared tool store failed.
codes.remediation: Check disk space and permissions for the configured tool-store location, then retry.

codes.message: A required prerequisite is missing.
codes.remediation: Install the missing prerequisite from the trusted next action and re-run the command.

codes.message: A prerequisite was found but its version is not supported.
codes.remediation: Install a supported version from the trusted prerequisite instructions and re-run the command.

codes.message: A required directory is unavailable.
codes.remediation: Fix the output, repository, temp, cache, or payload directory before re-running the command.

codes.message: A prerequisite install plan was not approved.
codes.remediation: Review the exact install plan and re-run with the matching --confirm-plan digest only if approved.

codes.message: Windows Package Manager is unavailable.
codes.remediation: Install or enable winget, or use the trusted manual prerequisite instructions.

codes.message: Windows Package Manager failed to install a prerequisite.
codes.remediation: Review the winget result, install the prerequisite manually if needed, and re-run the prerequisite check.

codes.message: The trusted prerequisite manifest is missing or invalid.
codes.remediation: Use a verified speckit-doti release payload; do not use repo-local install sources.

codes.message: The active Doti task file is missing.
codes.remediation: Create or restore the active feature task file, then re-run the Doti task hash or gate command.

codes.message: The active Doti task file contains no required tasks.
codes.remediation: Add required Markdown task entries before completing the implementation gate.

codes.message: A Doti task id appears more than once.
codes.remediation: Give each task a unique id before stamping task hashes.

codes.message: A required Doti task is not checked.
codes.remediation: Complete the task, check it in the task ledger, and re-run `doti task-hash stamp`.

codes.message: A checked Doti task is missing its canonical hash marker.
codes.remediation: Run `doti task-hash stamp` after every required task is complete.

codes.message: A checked Doti task hash no longer matches the canonical task content.
codes.remediation: Review the task text change, then re-run `doti task-hash stamp` only after the task is still complete.

codes.message: A Doti stage-transition commit is blocked.
codes.remediation: Fix the reported scope, gate, task-hash, or freshness blocker before starting the next Doti stage.

codes.message: The Doti release train is invalid.
codes.remediation: Repair or complete every included feature cycle before running the release path.

codes.message: Release-facing documentation is stale for the release train.
codes.remediation: Update README, CHANGELOG, or relevant documentation with the included feature slugs before release.

codes.message: The required executable-adjacent hx.config.json file is missing.
codes.remediation: Use a verified hx installation or restore hx.config.json next to hx.exe before running operational commands.

codes.message: The configured local release directory is invalid.
codes.remediation: Set localReleaseOutput.directory in hx.config.json to an absolute path, or disable local release output.

codes.message: The installer or Doti install target repository argument is missing.
codes.remediation: Pass the explicit target repository directory; the command does not default to the current directory.

codes.message: A managed Doti asset has been modified from its canonical baseline.
codes.remediation: Review the modified path and use --force only when replacing local customization is intended.

codes.message: Obsolete Doti asset removal was blocked by unproven or modified content.
codes.remediation: Inspect the blocked legacy path, preserve repo-owned content, or rerun with --force only when replacement is intended.

codes.message: A required Velopack release artifact is missing.
codes.remediation: Re-run the release command so installer/update artifacts and checksums are produced and inspected.

codes.message: Scaffold-installed Doti payload parity drift was detected.
codes.remediation: Run doti render-skills or repair the scaffold payload source before relying on generated repos.

codes.message: The installed payload descriptor (payload.manifest.json) is absent beside hx.
codes.remediation: Use a verified hx installation; the installed payload descriptor must ship beside the executable. Do not run installed commands from a source checkout.

codes.message: The installed payload descriptor is unparseable or carries an unsupported schemaVersion.
codes.remediation: Reinstall hx from a verified channel; the payload descriptor must be valid and integrity-anchored to the installed executable.

codes.message: The target repo's recorded Doti payload is newer than the installed tool's.
codes.remediation: Upgrade the installed hx (dotnet tool update -g Heurex.SpeckitDoti, or the Microsoft Store); the tool refuses to downgrade a repo's payload.

codes.message: A produced release artifact contains the tool's own build tree or a full source archive.
codes.remediation: Stage only the curated payload (template pack, manifests, grammars, .doti); the packaging gate refuses source in any in-scope artifact.

codes.message: A Doti task is checked out of order (an earlier task or phase is incomplete).
codes.remediation: Complete tasks in document/phase order; a task may be checked only when all earlier tasks are checked.

codes.message: A gate the declared tier enforces is missing or has malformed config.
codes.remediation: Restore the gate's configuration; an enforced gate with missing or malformed config fails closed (no delete-config bypass).

codes.message: A URL was refused by the Doti URL trust policy.
codes.remediation: Use an https URL on the host allowlist that does not resolve to a loopback, link-local, private, or cloud-metadata address.

codes.message: A bug-cycle fix is not bound to a recorded assessment.
codes.remediation: Run `doti bug assess` first; the fix stage must be bound to that assessment's verdict/remediation contract.

codes.message: The bug-cycle assessment for this bug is missing.
codes.remediation: Run `doti bug assess` to produce the read-only verdict/remediation contract before the fix or test stage.

codes.message: The converge command's required inputs (spec/plan/tasks) are missing or invalid.
codes.remediation: Ensure the active feature's spec, plan, and tasks exist before running `doti converge`.

codes.message: A stale stage cannot be safely re-stamped because a real input changed; its stage command must be re-run.
codes.remediation: Re-run the stage's command (e.g. re-clarify/re-plan/re-analyze) to regenerate its artifact, then stamp it.

codes.message: A stale stage cannot be re-stamped because its produced artifact is absent.
codes.remediation: Re-run the stage's command to produce its artifact before stamping; refresh refuses to bind an absent artifact.

codes.message: Two Sentrux optimization attempts stayed in the escalation band.
codes.remediation: Stop blind optimization; run a structural architecture review (/04-doti-arch-review) to decide functionality-driven growth (evidence-gated rebaseline) vs wrong architecture (refactor).

codes.message: A Sentrux rebaseline was refused.
codes.remediation: A rebaseline needs explicit operator intent AND a change-set-fresh arch-review record classifying the growth as functionality-driven; refactor instead if the architecture is wrong.

codes.message: A later release-train feature changed paths an earlier completed-unreleased feature owns or documents.
codes.remediation: Reconcile the cross-feature drift before release: update the earlier feature's spec/docs/code (or the later feature's), so the release train is internally consistent.

codes.message: The target path is not a Doti-enabled repository.
codes.remediation: Run `hx doti install --repo <path>` to set up Doti there first; update/check-version require an existing Doti repo.

codes.message: The repository has Doti installed but no recorded payload version.
codes.remediation: Run `hx doti update --repo <path>` to write the version stamp; older installs may lack one.

codes.message: Git is required for this command but was unavailable.
codes.remediation: Install Git and run inside a Git repository; `hx doti update`/`update-all` apply changes in a git worktree.

codes.message: A Doti repository update failed.
codes.remediation: See the per-repo reason (for example a dirty worktree or a git error) and re-run after resolving it.

codes.message: The sanctioned bug release-documentation commit failed after the gate passed.
codes.remediation: See the git reason (for example an index lock or a git error); the release-documentation fix is staged but not committed. Resolve it and re-run `hx doti bug release-docs`.

codes.message: The release failed and was automatically rolled back to the pre-release state.
codes.remediation: Fix the reported stage failure and re-run; the tag, release-root directory, and cycle-state were reverted. A residual means a compensation itself failed — check the reported paths.

codes.message: A bare stamp cannot clear a stage stale only on a prerequisite content change.
codes.remediation: Read the surfaced upstream diff, then re-author the stage OR record a reviewed-no-impact verdict: `doti cycle review-rebind --target <stage> --attest no-impact`.

codes.message: The target stage is not eligible for a reviewed-no-impact rebind.
codes.remediation: Only a doc/non-review, non-change-set-bound stage stale solely on a prerequisite content change can be attested; re-run the stage's command instead.

codes.message: The target stage is not stale; there is nothing to attest.
codes.remediation: Run `doti cycle status` to confirm the stage's freshness; review-rebind only applies to a stage stale on a prerequisite content change.

codes.message: The supplied setup configuration is invalid.
codes.remediation: Fix the named field(s) in the --config / .doti/setup.json (schemaVersion must be 1; agents are a subset of claude/codex; nextVersion is a 3-part SemVer; values carry no XML metacharacters or path traversal), then re-run. No files are created from an invalid config.

codes.message: No version-stamped Doti payload source could be resolved for the reconcile.
codes.remediation: Run `hx doti install`/`update`/`update-all` from an installed hx (its payload ships beside the executable), or from inside a Doti source checkout (a `.doti/core/skills.json` ancestor); the command fails closed rather than stamp from a non-payload source.

codes.message: No release-ready bug member justifies a release-documentation commit.
codes.remediation: Complete a confirmed, fix-bound, test-passed /doti-bug mini-cycle (`hx doti bug assess`/`fix`/`test`) before running `hx doti bug release-docs`; it refuses before any git mutation otherwise.
